# Transcrição: 03 Creating a Call Now Ad

- **Fonte:** 03 Creating a Call Now Ad
- **Duração:** 01:28
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:28]

Okay, so a really cool ad that you can run is having a call to action button that says call now, where if someone clicks on that, it brings up a phone number and someone can just dial it directly from Facebook. So let's have a look at how to create one of those. So the first thing to do is to understand that the campaign objective that you would use for this one is the reach. So we'll click on reach and let's just go through here. And you're basically going to set this up as you would any other normal campaign. So create your targeting at any custom audiences, anything like that. And where things differentiate is at the ad level. So what we're going to do here is go on scroll pass and go to the call to action button. And you'll see here it actually has the call now button. And you'll enter the phone number here. And this will essentially add that number to the Facebook ad. So when someone clicks on this, if we can preview this, you'll see it now has the call now button. And when we click on that, it's going to open FaceTime. So essentially messenger for the lead or the customer to allow them to ring you. Really great stuff for realtors or for any service based company.
